# llms.txt — machine-readable site context
# https://quicx.dev

Title: Quicx
Description: Quicx is a lightweight, deterministic task queue engine with a custom PMAD slab allocator and a fast binary protocol. Configure it once. Run it forever.
Author: Dimitar Anastasov
Repository: https://github.com/anastassow/Quicx
Contact: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dimitar-anastasov-339a94310/

# Core Architecture
- Single-threaded event loop (epoll/kqueue)
- Custom PMAD slab allocator (deterministic memory, zero fragmentation)
- Custom binary protocol (6-byte header, push/pop/ack/err)
- Written in C
- Java client library available (QuicxClient, QuicxWorker)
    
# Main Resources
Home: https://quicx.dev/
Documentation: https://quicx.dev/docs
Installer: https://quicx.dev/install.sh
